top_signals.title: Lenovo shares jump nearly 20% on record earnings as AI revenue nearly doubles
top_signals.summary: Shares of Lenovo surged over 15% on Friday, after the electronics giant posted strong revenue growth bolstered by its artificial intelligence business.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Opening Remarks by Commissioner Kadis at the European Maritime Day 2026 in Limassol, Cyprus
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Speech Limassol, 21 May 2026 Deputy Minister Hadjimanolis, Mayor Armeftis, dear colleagues and friends of the maritime community, ladies and gentlemen,
It is an honour to address you today ...
